name: Laurie Kilmartin
bio: Laurie Kilmartin is an American stand-up comedian and Emmy-nominated, WGA Award-winning comedy writer who spent eleven years on the writing staff of Conan. A finalist on Last Comic Standing, she is known for dark, unsentimental material on grief, parenting, and aging, much of it drawn from her father's and mother's deaths. Her specials include 45 Jokes About My Dead Dad and Cis Woke Grief Slut.

timeline.ev: Born in Santa Clara County, California
Performs first stand-up set in Martinez, California
Finalist on Last Comic Standing season 7
Releases special 45 Jokes About My Dead Dad
Releases special Cis Woke Grief Slut

accolades: Emmy-nominated, WGA Award-winning writer on Conan
45 Jokes About My Dead Dad named to Vulture's top comedy specials of 2016

bits.t: On What It's Like To Date As A Single Parent
